import React, { useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const Dashboard = () => { const [darkMode] = useState(false); // Theme switch will be added later const username = localStorage.getItem('username'); return (

📊 School Management Dashboard

Hi, {username} 👋

Welcome, {username}

📘 Subjects

Explore subjects offered by the school.

🏫 Classrooms

View classroom arrangement.

📅 Timetable

View class schedules.

✅ Attendance

Track daily attendance records.

🏅 Grades

View your grades.

); }; export default Dashboard;
